intraday.summary: Expect further downside pressure over next 2 hours as institutional hedging accelerates amid geopolitical tensions. SPY likely to test 674-673 support levels with VIX expansion.
intraday.key_driver: Iran war escalation fears driving systematic put hedging

next_day.summary: Tomorrow's session likely opens with gap down on overnight Middle East developments. Oil shock narrative dominates with defensive rotation continuing. SPY targets 670-672 zone.
next_day.key_driver: G7 emergency oil reserves release signals severity of supply disruption

long_term.summary: 30-day outlook deteriorating rapidly with stagflation risks materializing. Fed pivot narrative dead as oil shock forces hawkish stance. SPY likely to test 640-650 range with potential for deeper correction.
long_term.key_driver: Stagflation forcing Fed to maintain restrictive policy despite growth concerns

news_impact: Iran war escalation dominating sentiment with oil shock fears triggering risk-off rotation. G7 emergency reserves release confirms supply disruption severity. Stagflation narrative replacing soft landing thesis.
options_flow_impact: Massive institutional put hedging ($4.3M SPY puts, $2M MSFT puts) signals portfolio protection ahead of systemic event. 1.23 put/call ratio confirms bearish positioning. Deep ITM nature suggests catastrophic tail risk hedging.
risks: Iran conflict de-escalation could trigger violent short squeeze
Oil price reversal if strategic reserves effective
Tech earnings resilience could limit downside
